name: search_availability
description: Search LIVE appointment availability from the database. NEVER invent slots from memory. Re-run this tool whenever the caller changes date, time window, doctor, specialty, or branch. Set earliest_only=true when the caller asks for the earliest slot (search across practitioners and branches when filters allow).
execution_message_description: Natural holding phrase while checking live availability, e.g. 'One moment, checking that now' / 'Ek second, main check karti hoon'.

appointment_type_id.description: UUID of the appointment type from get_clinic_catalog.

appointment_type_name.description: Human name such as 'Dental Checkup' if UUID is not yet known.

branch_id.description: UUID of a specific branch. Omit to search across branches.

branch_name.description: Branch name fragment such as 'Koramangala' or 'Indiranagar'.

practitioner_id.description: UUID of a specific doctor when the caller named one.

practitioner_name.description: Doctor display-name fragment such as 'Ananya Rao'.

appointment_date.description: Local calendar date YYYY-MM-DD in the branch timezone. OMIT this field entirely for 'today', 'as soon as possible', or 'earliest available' requests — the backend defaults to the real current date, which is more reliable than computing it yourself. Only set this when the caller names a specific future date (e.g. 'next Tuesday', 'the 20th').

start_time.description: Optional local lower bound HH:MM:SS (e.g. 16:30:00 for after 4:30).

earliest_only.description: If true, return only the earliest matching slot across eligible practitioners/branches.

limit.description: Maximum slots to return when earliest_only is false. Default 5.
